'''Gargolyn IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] known to be a garden paradise that was lush with animal life and vegetation. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Cor]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. The land of the Cors was guarded by a huge beast that destroyed any settlement the scouting [[Karflo Corporation/Legends|Karflo Corporation]] initiated.

{{Planet-stub}}
